headline: Akamai’s Q1 Earnings Call: Our Top 5 Analyst Questions
summary: Akamai’s first quarter performance was shaped by surging demand for its cloud infrastructure and security solutions, with management pointing to a landmark $1.8 billion customer win as a pivotal moment for the business. CEO F. Thomson Leighton emphasized that the company’s distributed architecture and ability to deliver low-latency compute and security at scale were core differentiators in attracting large enterprise customers.
